design_philosophy: Museum-grade editorial e-commerce. Hermès meets Sabyasachi. Cinematic, minimal UI chrome, slow pacing, rich textile textures, and deep heritage storytelling. Prioritize generous whitespace, asymmetrical editorial grids, and sophisticated typography over generic 'card' layouts.

rules: Headings (H1/H2) must use Bodoni Moda. Subtitles and large category labels use Marcellus.
Use 'Yatra One' exclusively for Hindi/Marathi accent words (e.g., 'परंपरा', 'Solapur chi Shaan') as decorative elements, opacified to 10-20% in the background, or small gold accents.
Never center-align body text. Keep paragraphs left-aligned.
Ensure H1/H2 are extremely tight (tracking-tighter) for the luxury fashion magazine feel.

grid_strategies.product_listing: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-x-8 gap-y-16. No borders on product items. Let the image define the boundary.
grid_strategies.editorial_showcase: Asymmetrical bento. 12-column grid. Hero image spans col 1-7. Text block spans col 9-12. Huge negative space.
grid_strategies.category_grid: Alternating heights. Col 1 items are tall, Col 2 items are square, creating a masonry-like editorial tension.

visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid var(--border). Use heavily on the Wholesale form to create a 'technical luxury' or 'document' feel.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Ambient diffuse shadows only on sticky header. Products should NOT have drop shadows. Use flat layouts.
visual_enhancers.radius: rounded-none or max rounded-sm (2px). Luxury is sharp, not bubbly.
visual_enhancers.textures: Apply a very subtle SVG noise overlay (opacity 0.03) globally to make the background feel like handmade paper, not digital pixels.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Only for sticky nav: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FDFBF7]/80 border-b border-[#D8CDBF]/50.

component_strategies.hero_section: 90vh to 100vh full-width image. Apply bg-black/30 overlay for text contrast. H1 is massive, white, positioned bottom-left. A small vertical 'Scroll to Explore' text with a gold line on the bottom-right.
component_strategies.navigation: Sticky top, crystal glass. Left: 'Est. 1970'. Center: Logo 'MARDA & SONS' in Bodoni Moda. Right: Icons (Cart, Wishlist, WhatsApp).
component_strategies.product_card: No card wrapper. Direct image rendering. Aspect ratio 3:4 (portrait) or 4:5. Image on hover scales up 105% slowly. Text below image: Title (left), Price (right).
component_strategies.buttons: Primary: bg-[#6A1A2A] text-[#FDFBF7] hover:bg-[#50121F] uppercase tracking-widest px-8 py-4. Secondary: border border-[#2A1D1A] text-[#2A1D1A] hover:bg-[#2A1D1A] hover:text-[#FDFBF7].
component_strategies.wholesale_inquiry: Split layout. Left: Deep maroon background with Gold text 'Become a Partner'. Right: Shadcn form tailored with sharp edges, bottom-border only inputs (flair inputs) rather than full boxes.
component_strategies.footer: bg-[#2A1D1A] text-[#FDFBF7]. Massive padding (py-32). Huge logo at the bottom. Link columns for Retail, Wholesale, Heritage. Incorporate a delicate gold mandala or weave pattern as a watermark.
component_strategies.forms: Use Shadcn UI forms but strip out standard rounded borders. Make inputs look like luxury print forms (border-b-2 border-brand_gold focus:border-brand_primary).
component_strategies.whatsapp_fab: Fixed bottom-right. Instead of standard bright green, use a dark maroon circle with gold WhatsApp icon, to maintain brand integrity.

motion_and_interactions.scroll_reveal: Elements fade in and translate Y (y: 40 to 0) with duration 1s, ease: [0.16, 1, 0.3, 1] (custom spring/bezier for slow, heavy feel).
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Images slowly zoom (scale 1.05 over 1.5s). Buttons sweep background colors. Text links get a 1px gold underline that scales from left to right (origin-left).
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Smooth and slow. If using Framer Motion, implement an exit/enter overlay (e.g., Maroon curtain wipe or simple long crossfade).
motion_and_interactions.lenis_scroll: MANDATORY. Smooth scrolling must be enabled for the cinematic pacing.

hero.description: Opulent Indian heritage textile boutique, royal maroon and antique gold.

textures.description: Macro photography of gold and maroon textile threads. Use for the 'Heritage Story' section background.

products_editorial.description: Flat lay of traditional shawls and Maharashtrian Pheta.
Intricate Kanchipuram weave details, usable for Bedsheets/Saree category headers.

mood_images.description: Silver necklace on red textile, representing craftsmanship.

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a premium Next.js 14 E-commerce template for Marda & Sons.
Ensure all fonts (Bodoni Moda, Marcellus, Jost, Yatra One) are loaded correctly via next/font or standard link tags.
Implement the 'Museum-grade editorial' aesthetic. No generic cards with drop shadows.
Integrate Shadcn components (Forms, Select) but strip out rounded corners to keep it sharp (rounded-none).
Use framer-motion heavily for scroll-based fades and slow image reveals.
Include a 'Wholesale vs Retail' conceptual split on the Contact page.
Ensure the WhatsApp FAB uses the brand colors (maroon/gold) instead of native green to maintain the luxury feel.
Use the provided image URLs exclusively for media.
